title: How can i purge myself of Eva
display_title: How can i purge myself of Eva
wikitext:
[]: How can i purge myself of Eva?             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Wed Sep 06, 2006 10:05 pm Im thinking of doing a purge before i view the plat. collection. I saw the last 8 eps on my comp. It was really bad.... and i havent seen it clear so... I want to purge myself before i see it in all its glory any tips?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Sep 06, 2006 10:10 pm Or, you can do like I did and watch Firefly first (I bought both shows at the same time). ;)

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Sep 06, 2006 10:20 pm I'm sorry, you can't. I haven't been able to purge NGE with anything since I first saw it in May. Well, I did see it when Cartoon Network played it during "Giant Robot Week", but what good is NGE without Pen-Pen. But anyway, I haven't found a way to get it out of my mind, its burned in there now. Timstuff, may I borrow that flashy stick thingy.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 06, 2006 10:21 pm Try beating yourself up like in fight club! And then try eating a large clump of wasabi!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 06, 2006 11:00 pm Timstuff wrote: <<insert neuralizer>>

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Wed Sep 06, 2006 11:44 pm Think of it as a turd in your brain that you must push out. Whichever path it must take to reach that hole in the bottom, find it, and hear it plop out with a sickly squirt. Sense the emptiness in your brain. A void where NGE once was. That makes me want to take a huuuuuuge dump in the woods and whipe my ass with twigs....so bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 06, 2006 11:49 pm And then hide the turd in your freinds food and see what happens :o

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Sep 07, 2006 12:01 am Defectron wrote: And then hide the turd in your freinds food and see what happens :o

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 07, 2006 8:44 am Either abstain from evaness for a while before hand, or just sit back with a nice big screen, big speakers, and watch it in all it's subtitled glory.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:17 am Timstuff wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Thu Sep 07, 2006 9:52 am it's easy if you have seen only 8 eps one time but how can purge myself of NGE now that I have seen it 3 times and something and unlimited times from AMVs plot analisis death and such?? (I'm going to see it in all it's renewal might in a 75+ inch "screen" with a friend) lol

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Sep 07, 2006 12:06 pm Purge yourself of EVA? Dude, this is the question everyone here have been asking. EVERYONE want to forget NGE just to watch it and soil their parents of excitment again. Let me know if you find the way. PLEASE.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Sep 07, 2006 3:56 pm I wouldn't mind purging myself of Eva. And maybe this time thru I won't be stupid enough to watch it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 07, 2006 4:37 pm Defectron wrote: And then hide the turd in your freinds food and see what happens :o

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Sep 08, 2006 1:58 am You can't. You're screwed. Merry Christmas, your mother is a pig.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Sep 08, 2006 9:05 am Legend of the Past wrote: Purge yourself of EVA? Dude, this is the question everyone here have been asking. EVERYONE want to forget NGE just to watch it and soil their parents of excitment again. Let me know if you find the way. PLEASE.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sun Sep 10, 2006 8:07 pm You could ram your head into a brick wall. Hope to God for amnesia.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Sep 11, 2006 12:35 pm Mundane wrote: You could ram your head into a brick wall. Hope to God for amnesia.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Sep 11, 2006 12:59 pm ok, I couldn't (of course :P) purge myself of Eva, but even then, THAT WAS THE BEST ANIME/MOVIE EXPERIANCE I'VE EVER HAD!!! no real need to purge and to see NGE anymore

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Sep 11, 2006 4:07 pm I prescribe: The entire first eight seasons of Stagate SG-1, FFVII: Advent Children, BattleStar Galactica, pseudodifferential calculus, Deadwood liberally sprinkled with 200+ hours of Oblivion. The effects are temporary.
